svg.title: hprof-tui feature roadmap aligned to HeapLens
svg.desc: Four milestone phases mapping heaplens features to the Rust TUI, from current state through Phase 3.
svg.text: Phase 1 — Object inspector & GC root path (engine ready, wire up)
Phase 2 — HeapQL query tab (new TUI work)
HeapQL tables: instances · class_histogram · dominator_tree · leak_suspects — JOINs, aggregates, subqueries, size literals (1MB)
Phase 3 — Heap compare & timeline (new TUI work)
AI Chat tab excluded per scope. Source bridge requires JVM tooling outside Rust.
HeapLens engine (Apache 2.0) already implements all data APIs — TUI work is pure UI wiring.
